title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Bour-bon! Bour-bon!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon's definitely the star of the show today. I
hope that she does just as great as Teio did last
year.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Wait, weren't you the one saying Bourbon
couldn't make it in the Classics back at her debut
race?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that was then, and this is now! Her
performance in the Satsuki Sho totally changed
my mind!

All kinds of clamor can be heard coming from the
stands. Meanwhile, in the waiting area...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

Ever since the Satsuki Sho, everyone has
recognized that Mihono Bourbon is fully capable
of competing in the Classics. Expectations for her
are high.

But I'm a little worried that she's starting to feel
the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There is no correlation between my condition and
the opinions of others.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby will be mine.
I'm relieved that she expresses such confidence.
Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice? Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry to barge in! Um, do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I have something I, um, want to say...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No problem. Go ahead.

Nervousness is written all over Rice Shower's face
as she takes a deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I've always thought you were so amazing,
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're a cool Umamusume who has the power to
make everyone smile...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I've always wanted to be like that someday, but...

She looks up at Mihono Bourbon as if she's set
her mind on something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I realized something at the Satsuki Sho... If I don't
change, then that "someday" will never come!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The weak Rice Shower has to go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So... I'm going to catch up to you today!

Her typically timid eyes shine with strength for a
moment.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-anyway, I'll see you later!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I've never seen Rice like that before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't matter. My only objective today is
to win.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who'll be crowned the champion of this year's
Japanese Derby?! We're about to find out!
